MUSE SPARK 1.1
articles.summary: Meta introduced Muse Spark 1.1 with improved tool use, coding, computer interaction, and multimodal reasoning. The company also opened a public preview of its Meta Model API for developers.

articles.title: OPENAI RETIRED ATLAS
articles.summary: OpenAI shut down its Atlas browser and shifted its agentic browsing features into ChatGPT's desktop app and a Chrome extension. The decision followed a broader effort to reduce side projects while continuing to develop AI-assisted web browsing.

articles.title: GPT-5.6: FRONTIER INTELLIGENCE THAT SCALES WITH YOUR AMBITION
articles.summary: OpenAI launched GPT-5.6, featuring models Sol, Terra, and Luna, with Sol leading in intelligence and efficiency for coding, cybersecurity, and science. The models excel with fewer tokens at lower costs, with Sol notably outperforming competitors like Claude Fable 5. Enhanced capabilities include multi-agent parallel processing and improved design judgment, advancing cybersecurity and scientific research while maintaining strong safety measures.

articles.title: GPT-5.6 REVIEW
articles.summary: The review highlights GPT-5.6's significant advancements in language understanding and generation, outperforming its predecessors. It demonstrates improved contextual accuracy and adaptability across various applications. These enhancements could substantially impact AI-driven industries.

articles.title: GPT-5.6 SERIES
articles.summary: GPT-5.6 Sol is the standout model of the GPT-5.6 family. It is the first model to win an ARC-AGI-3 public game. The model is able to read an unfamiliar scene correctly and in the game's own vocabulary. It won the game on ARC-AGI because it correctly oriented itself in a new environment first.

articles.title: EVOLVING WINDOWS VULNERABILITY MANAGEMENT TO MEET THE SPEED OF AI-POWERED DISCOVERY
articles.summary: Windows leverages AI to enhance vulnerability discovery, reduce fix times, and offer timely security updates. It uses the MDASH scanning system and dedicated cloud infrastructure to streamline identifying and fixing issues. By integrating AI into the security update process and collaborating internally and externally, Windows aims to maintain protection speed without compromising update quality.

FLEXIBLE VIDEO DIFFUSION
articles.summary: Flex-Forcing trains video diffusion models to switch between bidirectional and autoregressive generation through flexible temporal and denoising-step chunking. The approach improves inference speed, video quality, and long-range stability across different compute budgets.

articles.title: Z.AI'S STABLE ASYNCHRONOUS RL
articles.summary: Single-rollout Asynchronous Optimization replaces GRPO-style grouped sampling with one rollout per prompt, supported by value-model training and strict token-level clipping.

articles.title: PRISMA
articles.summary: Offers tools like Prisma Client for type-safe database queries in Node.js and TypeScript, Prisma Migrate for data modeling, and Prisma Studio for GUI database editing.

articles.title: OPENAI'S NO. 2 EXECUTIVE TO STEP DOWN IN LATEST LEADERSHIP SHAKE-UP
articles.summary: OpenAI's Fidji Simo plans to step down from her role as a full-time executive after an extended medical leave. She will become a part-time adviser to the company. Her neuroimmune condition has worsened, and her road to recovery will take much longer than anticipated. Simo's product and business responsibilities will be divided among President Greg Brockman, CFO Sarah Friar, and Chief Strategy Officer Jason Kwon.

articles.title: OPENAI MAY HAVE MADE A FATAL MISSTEP IN COPYRIGHT FIGHT WITH NEWS ORGS
articles.summary: News organizations suing OpenAI have accused the AI firm of repeatedly lying for years to conceal evidence of infringement that could hobble its defense. OpenAI privacy engineer Vincent Monaco has revealed that OpenAI misled the court for two years about the cost and burdens of searching ChatGPT logs. OpenAI has pretended from the earliest stages of the case that it did not have the technical ability to search large anonymized samples of ChatGPT logs when it had actually already conducted such searches prior to the start of litigation. The discovery may lead to serious sanctions against OpenAI.

articles.title: CHATGPT WORK
articles.summary: ChatGPT Work is a GPT-5.6-powered workspace that gathers context from team tools and acts across files and desktop applications. It was designed to turn fragmented project materials into finished documents, spreadsheets, and presentations.

MERCOR IS IN TALKS FOR A $20B VALUATION
articles.summary: AI training startup Mercor seeks to raise a round at a $20 billion valuation, doubling from its last $10 billion valuation in October.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC APPOINTS FORMER FED CHAIR BEN BERNANKE TO ITS INDEPENDENT TRUST
articles.summary: Anthropic appointed former Fed Chair Ben Bernanke to its Long-Term Benefit Trust to help navigate AI's economic impacts.

articles.title: INVITING HARD QUESTIONS
articles.summary: Anthropic has invited public input on AI-related concerns, conducting surveys and focus groups to understand societal hopes and fears.

articles.title: META'S NEW AI CHIPS WILL BEGIN PRODUCTION IN SEPTEMBER
articles.summary: Netta and Broadcom are working on the chip design, with TSMC set to manufacture it.

articles.title: ELON MUSK PRAISES MYTHOS/FABLE, PROMISES NOT TO ‘CUT OFF' ANTHROPIC
articles.summary: Elon Musk insists that he's full of admiration for rival Anthropic.
